|desc={{p|Ursaring|Teddy}} (Japanese: '''クマちゃん''' ''Kuma-chan'') is Katy's first known Pokémon and first appeared as a {{p|Teddiursa}}. It is capable of {{Tera}}stallizing into a {{t|Bug}} type. Katy used it in her battle against [[Liko]] and her {{TP|Liko|Floragato}}. Despite Liko Terastallizing her Floragato, Teddy was ultimately able to overwhelm and defeat her. It reappeared during a flashback in ''[[HZ063|Ice Battle! Cold-Eyed Grusha]]''.

In ''[[HZ098|Reunion in Cortondo]]'', it was shown to have evolved into an Ursaring. Katy used it in her [[rematch]] against Liko, where it battled [[Pagogo]], only to be defeated.

Teddy reappeared during a flashback in ''[[HZ100|We Are the Rising Volt Tacklers!]]'', when Murdock revealed he was leaving to rejoin the Rising Volt Tacklers.

Teddy's known moves are {{m|Charm}}, {{m|Slash}}, {{m|Sweet Scent}}, {{m|Fury Cutter}}, {{m|High Horsepower}}, and {{m|Hammer Arm}}.}}

|desc={{p|Lokix}} is Katy's second known Pokémon. In ''[[HZ056|Liko vs. Rika! Towards the Battle's End]]'', it participated in a [[Multi Battle|Tag Battle]] with Liko's Floragato against Rika's {{p|Dugtrio}} and {{p|Clodsire}}. After being {{status|poison}}ed, Lokix activated its Ability and managed to deal major damage to both opponents, paralyzing Dugtrio in the process, before finally succumbing to the poison.

Lokix's known moves are {{m|Throat Chop}}, {{m|Lunge}}, {{m|Struggle Bug}}, and {{m|Bounce}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Swarm}}.}}
